metadata.jumi.testShortcut: This fixture is a Sprint 3B same-node local_reuse smoke. The producer promotes its output into a node-local CAS area, and the consumer reuses it on the same worker node.
metadata.jumi.obsoleteCompatibility: This is a VM happy-path profile that exercises node-local promotion and local_reuse only. It does not validate remote fallback, external publish, or artifact source registry behavior.

command: mkdir -p /out; dd if=/dev/zero of=/out/result bs=1048576 count=1; sha256sum /out/result; wc -c /out/result

mkdir -p /out; printf 'mode=%s expectedDigest=%s nodeLocalPath=%s localPath=%s\n' "$JUMI_INPUT_RESULT_MATERIALIZATION_MODE" "$JUMI_INPUT_RESULT_EXPECTED_DIGEST" "$JUMI_INPUT_RESULT_NODE_LOCAL_PATH" "$JUMI_INPUT_RESULT_LOCAL_PATH"; test -f "$JUMI_INPUT_RESULT_LOCAL_PATH"; sha256sum "$JUMI_INPUT_RESULT_LOCAL_PATH"; wc -c "$JUMI_INPUT_RESULT_LOCAL_PATH"; cp "$JUMI_INPUT_RESULT_LOCAL_PATH" /out/consumed
